# Generated by tools/build_adiscord_technology_system.py.
# The campaign begins in 2160; recovered 2100-2150 knowledge is baseline,
# while the dense 2160+ programmes remain player and AI decisions.

		popup = no
	}
	# Existing line battalions now require squad fire-support kits.  Give
	# every country a modest transition reserve while AI production catches up.
	if = {
		limit = { num_of_military_factories > 6 }
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
			type = ADISCORD_squad_weapons_equipment_0
			amount = 400
			producer = ROOT
		}
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
			type = support_equipment_1
			amount = 300
			producer = ROOT
		}
	}
	else = {
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
			type = ADISCORD_squad_weapons_equipment_0
			amount = 200
			producer = ROOT
		}
		add_equipment_to_stockpile = {
			type = support_equipment_1
			amount = 150
			producer = ROOT
		}
	}
}
